description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a sprawling, open-plan layout. The structure features large floor-to-ceiling windows, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor integration. The exterior is surrounded by manicured lawns, mature trees, and landscaped shrubbery, with a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. The backyard includes a private pool area, partially enclosed by fencing and greenery for privacy. The house is constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and wood, with clean lines and minimalistic detailing. The overall design emphasizes openness, functionality, and a strong connection to the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped surroundings, featuring a private pool and open-plan design.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an angled front perspective, highlighting the main entrance, driveway, and a clear view of the open-plan interior layout.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a direct front view, focusing on the driveway, main entryway, and the symmetrical landscaping with trees and grass.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the house, showcasing the backyard, pool area, and privacy fencing, with large windows facing the garden.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a view from the opposite rear angle, emphasizing the open living spaces, pool, and the integration of indoor and outdoor areas.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide, flat door, paved approach, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping and open to the driveway.
